title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 150.140 - Blanks to collector
text:
150.140.  Blanks to collector. — Such clerk shall deliver to the collector of his county all licenses so issued, and charge him therewith in a book to be kept for that purpose.
(RSMo 1939 § 11313, A.L. 1945 p. 1838) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 10085; 1919 § 13075; 1909 § 11627
